name: Shinki Bus Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shinki Bus Co.,Ltd. provides transportation services in Japan. The company offers passenger services, such as fixed-route buses, high-speed shared buses, chartered buses, and taxis, as well as postal transportation and automobile maintenance services. It also engages in the wholesale and retail of auto parts and supplies; sale of new and used cars; maintenance and repair of cars; and sale of life and non-life insurance products. In addition, the company sells, leases, and brokerages real estate properties; and operates restaurants and cafes, and outdoor facilities. Further, it provides travel, nursing care, cleaning and security, facility management, staffing, and advertisement services, as well as offers cosmetic and agricultural products. The company was formerly known as Shinki Sogo Jidosha K.K. and changed its name to Shinki Bus Co.,Ltd. in 1972. Shinki Bus Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1927 and is headquartered in Himeji, Japan.
